hooks.prompt:
Review the most recent git commit in this project. Check:
1. Are there any obvious bugs or issues in the changed files?
2. Are there missing files, broken references, or inconsistencies?
3. Does the change follow good practices for this project type?

Report a brief summary: either "✅ LGTM" with one-line summary, or "⚠️ Issues found" with specific problems listed.

Use Read and Bash(git diff HEAD~1) to inspect the changes.
A markdown file was just written. Quickly check if it looks well-structured: proper headers, no broken links, clear formatting. Report only if there are issues. Keep it to 1-2 sentences.
